assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are 6 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-advisory-summary-model.md, task-2-aggregation-service.md, task-3-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-threshold-filter.md, task-6-integration-tests.md. 6 is within the range [3, 10].

Every task file begins with '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'. Task 1: line 2 'trustify-backend'. Task 2: line 2 'trustify-backend'. Task 3: line 2 'trustify-backend'. Task 4: line 2 'trustify-backend'. Task 5: line 2 'trustify-backend'. Task 6: line 2 'trustify-backend'.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 depends on nothing. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 1 and Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3. Task 6 depends on Task 3. This forms a directed acyclic graph: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5, 6}. No circular dependencies exist — all edges point from lower-numbered tasks to higher-numbered tasks.

assertion_results.evidence: Cross-referencing against repo-backend.md directory tree: Task 1 creates 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs' (new file in existing model/ dir) and modifies 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs' (exists). Task 2 creates 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/advisory_summary.rs' (new file in existing service/ dir) and modifies 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs' (exists). Task 3 creates 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs' (new file in existing endpoints/ dir) and modifies 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs' (exists). Task 4 modifies 'modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs' (exists). Task 5 modifies 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs' (created in Task 3) and 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/advisory_summary.rs' (created in Task 2). Task 6 creates 'tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs' (new file in existing tests/api/ dir) and modifies 'tests/Cargo.toml' (exists). All paths are within existing directories from the repo structure.

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact map in impact-map.md lists 7 specific changes, each with concrete details: (1) 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct with fields: critical, high, medium, low, total', (2) 'Add advisory severity aggregation service method to SbomService that queries the sbom_advisory join table, deduplicates by advisory ID, groups by severity', (3) 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler with 5-minute cache-control header and 404 handling for missing SBOMs', (4) 'Register the new advisory-summary route in the SBOM endpoints module', (5) 'Add cache invalidation logic in the advisory ingestion pipeline when new advisories are linked to an SBOM', (6) 'Add optional ?threshold query parameter to filter severity counts above a given severity level', (7) 'Add integration tests for the advisory-summary endpoint covering: happy path with correct counts, 404 for non-existent SBOM, deduplication of advisories, and threshold filtering'. Each item names specific structs, endpoints, tables, or test scenarios.
